allow: Bash(cd "/c/Users/COMP/Desktop/brew and bloom" && rm -rf node_modules/.vite && echo cleared)

PowerShell(try { Stop-Process -Id 12596 -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "killed 12596" } catch { Write-Output \("kill-failed: " + $_.Exception.Message\) }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($c\){ Write-Output \("still-listening PID=" + $c.OwningProcess\) } else { Write-Output "PORT_FREE" })
